member.name: T:IkeMtz.NRSRx.Core.Web.HostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring logging on the host builder.

member.name: M:IkeMtz.NRSRx.Core.Web.HostBuilderExtensions.UseLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the host builder to use logging.
